---
title: "Projects"
format: html
---

# Projects

## Northwind Traders Sales & Customer Analytics

Boston, MA | Aug 2025 – Dec 2025
**Tools**: Python (Jupyter Notebook), SQL

- Developed and executed complex SQL queries within Python to extract and analyze data from a relational database
- Analyzed 1,500+ sales transactions across customers, employees, and product categories
- Evaluated sales performance, revenue trends, and customer purchasing behavior
- Built dashboards and visualizations to highlight revenue drivers and customer segments
- Translated analytical findings into actionable insights to support sales strategy and decision-making

---

## Salary & Compensation Trends Analysis — U.S. Job Market

Boston, MA | Mar 2025 – May 2025
**Tools**: Python, AWS EC2, SQL, GitHub, VS Code

- Analyzed 71,000+ job records to evaluate salary and compensation trends across industries, regions, and work arrangements
- Deployed a cloud-based analytics environment using AWS EC2 to enable scalable data processing
- Conducted exploratory data analysis (EDA) to identify patterns in compensation, remote work trends, and geographic differences
- Assessed the impact of experience, role type, and technical skills on salary outcomes
- Developed analytical models for salary benchmarking and trend forecasting, delivering actionable workforce insights

---

## Housing Market Price & Demand Analysis — Queens, New York

Boston, MA | Oct 2024 – Dec 2024
**Tools**: Power BI, Random Forest (R), Forecasting (R), Ggplot 2 (R), Predicting Modeling (R)

- Analyzed 2,500+ residential property records to assess housing prices and demand trends
- Built and evaluated Random Forest models to estimate property values and identify key drivers
- Performed forecasting to assess short-term market trends and expected sale outcomes
- Cleaned and validated datasets to improve data quality and model performance
- Delivered insights to support pricing strategy and market segmentation  

---

## MBTA System Analysis — Reliability & Efficiency Optimization

Boston, MA | Jan 2025 – Mar 2025
**Tools**: Data Analysis, Cost-Benefit Analysis, Performance Metrics

- Analyzed operational data from 50 bus routes to evaluate service reliability and delays
- Identified opportunities for 10% cost reduction and 15% efficiency improvement
- Developed performance metrics and monitoring frameworks for transit operations
- Integrated multiple data sources to support structured reporting
- Provided insights to support data-driven operational and planning decisions

---

## Investment Feasibility Analysis — In-House Microbrewery

Boston, MA | Aug 2024 – Nov 2024
**Tools**: Financial Modeling, Break-Even Analysis, Sensitivity Analysis, Market Research

- Conducted a 3-year financial feasibility analysis for a $150K investment in a microbrewery
- Modeled production capacity of 476K+ pints annually and evaluated operational feasibility
- Built demand forecasts covering 400K+ projected units over three years
- Performed market analysis and customer segmentation to support positioning strategy
- Delivered investment recommendations based on profitability and long-term growth potential
